user_query:
Hi! I’m getting my portfolio ready for upcoming heritage festivals and need a quick system audit of my local artwork files. Please use the index at input/art_index.csv to check the actual files under artworks/ and produce these deliverables:

1) Generate reports/art_inventory.csv with these columns for every row in the index (no extras):
- file_name
- category
- expected_path (always "artworks/<file_name>")
- exists (true/false)
- size_bytes (integer; leave blank if missing)
- last_modified_iso (ISO-8601 string; leave blank if missing)
Sort this CSV by file_name ascending.

2) Generate reports/top5_largest.csv listing up to 5 existing files ranked by size_bytes (largest first). Include columns: file_name, size_bytes, category. Break ties by file_name ascending.

3) Generate reports/category_counts.csv summarizing how many existing files there are per category. Columns: category, count_existing. Sort by count_existing descending, then category ascending.

4) Edit docs/portfolio_overview.md in place by replacing these placeholders with computed values, keeping the rest of the document unchanged:
- {{TOTAL_LISTED}}: total number of rows in input/art_index.csv
- {{EXISTS_COUNT}}: number of files that actually exist under artworks/
- {{MISSING_COUNT}}: number of listed files that are missing
- {{TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES}}: sum of size_bytes across all existing files
- {{TOP5_TABLE}}: replace with 5 lines, one per row from reports/top5_largest.csv, formatted as "file_name,size_bytes" (no header)
- {{CATEGORY_TABLE}}: replace with lines from reports/category_counts.csv, formatted as "category,count_existing" (no header)

Notes and constraints:
- Treat all file paths as relative to the workspace.
- Use only the files listed below. Do not assume or fetch anything else.
- The index should be the source of truth for which files to check; a file not listed should not appear in any output. Conversely, missing files must be represented correctly in art_inventory.csv.
- All outputs must be written exactly to the paths specified above under a new or existing reports/ directory and the existing docs/portfolio_overview.md must be updated in place.

This will help me verify what’s ready for the festivals and spot large scans I might want to compress. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
